function.name: searchInventory
function.description: Search the products inventory for items matching a query. Searches both product names and descriptions. Returns an array of products with details including id, name, description, price, technical specifications, and YouTube URL. Use this to help customers find products based on their needs, preferences, or requirements.

query.description: The search query to find products. Can be a product name, keyword, category, or description. Examples: 'microphone', 'audio interface', 'speakers', 'studio monitors', 'podcasting equipment', 'condenser mic'

function.name: addToCart
function.description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart. Requires the user to be authenticated. If the item already exists in the cart, the quantity will be updated. Returns success status and a message. Use this when the customer wants to purchase a product.

productId.description: The UUID of the product to add to cart. This is the product ID returned from searchInventory.

quantity.description: The quantity of items to add to the cart. Must be a positive integer.

function.name: fetchWebSpecs
function.description: Fetch technical specifications and detailed information about a product from trusted online sources. Use this when you need more detailed technical specs, compatibility information, release dates, or specifications that may not be in the local database. Returns top 3-5 search results with technical information.

query.description: The search query for technical specifications. Should include the product name and what specs you're looking for. Examples: 'Shure SM7B microphone specifications', 'Focusrite Scarlett 2i2 compatibility', 'Yamaha HS8 studio monitor technical specs'
